steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to request refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend (account 801234567)
Submit formal claim citing DE-NO tax treaty rate of 5% should apply, not the 25% withheld
Provide treaty relief documentation showing Norwegian tax residency qualifies for reduced withholding
If custodian cannot process, file direct refund claim with German BZSt using investment income procedures

references.title: BZSt – Capital Yield Tax Relief / Refund Procedures
